resources.string: Complete your purchase securely through Google Play.
Connecting to Google Play\u2026
Google Play Billing is not available on this device.
Something went wrong: %1$s
You\'re all set! Welcome to the full version of Felicity.
You already own this — enjoy the full version!
Your purchase has been restored. Welcome back!
%1$d days left
Trial expired
Full version active
Unlimited playback with no interruptions.
Built-in equalizer with presets.
MilkDrop visualizer.
Beautiful themes with various customizations.
Synchronized lyrics displayed in real time while you listen.
Local Wi-Fi server to stream your library to any browser on your network.
One-time purchase. Pay once, own it, no recurring charges.
All future updates included at no extra cost.
Get the full app with no restrictions.
Restore Purchase

No purchase found on this account.\n\nIf you bought Felicity with a different Google account, please switch to that account in the Play Store and try again. If you believe this is a mistake, contact support.
Restoring\u2026
